notes: Tracking which clinics have had Google review collection attempted. Google Maps reviews require Places API for full access — web scraping only gets snippets without reviewer names.

attempted.name: Drip Gym - Jackson Heights
attempted.notes: 3 real reviews found via indexed Google Maps URL and search snippets

attempted.name: Faces in Bloom
attempted.notes: 500+ reviews on Google but names not indexed. Snippets only. Needs Places API.

attempted.name: PNW Hydration & Wellness
attempted.notes: ~10 reviews on Google/Yelp but names not crawlable. Needs Places API.

attempted.name: PURE SKIIN
attempted.notes: 420+ reviews on Google but behind auth wall. Needs Places API.

attempted.name: Manhattan IV Therapy
attempted.notes: Reviews exist but names not indexed. Needs Places API.

recommendation: To get real Google reviews at scale, set up Google Places API (free tier: 200 req/day). Each clinic needs its Google Place ID, then call the Place Details API to get reviews.
